zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Yelverton II於1458年出生在英國諾福爾可盧加姆時，他的父親Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Bench24歲，母親Anne Paston18歲。他於1486年4月18日與Katherine Randes在英國諾福爾可盧加姆結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1518年6月10日在英國諾福爾可拉可亞斯享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Yelverton II于1458年出生在英国諾福爾可盧加姆时，他的父亲Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Bench24岁，母亲Anne Paston18岁。他于1486年4月18日与Katherine Randes在英国諾福爾可盧加姆结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1518年6月10日在英国諾福爾可拉可亞斯享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Yelverton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon): habitational name from either of two places called Yelverton, in Norfolk or Devon. Medieval examples of the surname are from the Norfolk place, but the modern surname in Britain is associated mainly with Devon, where the earliest record of the surname is found in 1761, and is probably a substitution for Elford , an earlier form of the Devon placename. The Devon place, a hamlet in Buckland Monachorum, is not officially on record as Yelverton until the 19th century, when the Great Western Railway so named the station it built there in 1859. It is a dialect pronunciation of Elverton, which is first recorded in 1765 as an extended form of its medieval name Elford + -ton ‘town’. The Norfolk placename is recorded as Ailuertuna in 1086, and probably derives from the Old English personal name Æthelfrith or Geldfrith + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Elford
meanings: English: habitational name from Yelverton in Buckland Monachorum (Devon), recorded as Elleford in 1291 (see Yelverton ), named from the Old English personal name Ella or elle, ellen ‘elder tree’ + ford ‘ford’. The name may also derive from any of the places called Elford in Staffordshire and Northumberland, both probably from the Old English personal name Ella + ford.

variants.name: Yelvington
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Yelverton  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Yelverton II was born in 1458, in Rougham, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Bench, was 24 and his mother, Anne Paston, was 18. He married Katherine Randes on 18 April 1486, in Rougham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 10 June 1518, in Rackheath, Norfolk, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Yelverton II est né en 1458, à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Bench, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Anne Paston, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Randes le 18 avril 1486, à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 10 juin 1518, à Rackheath, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Yelverton II 1458 in Rougham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Bench 24 und seine Mutter Anne Paston 18. Er hat am 18. April 1486 in Rougham, Norfolk, England Katherine Randes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Juni 1518 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Rackheath, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Yelverton II è nato il nel 1458 nel Rougham, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Bench, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Anne Paston, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Randes il 18 aprile 1486, nel Rougham, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 10 giugno 1518, nel Rackheath, Norfolk, England, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Yelverton IIが1458年にイギリスノーフォルクロウアムで生まれた時，父Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Benchは24歳，母Anne Pastonは18歳であった。1486年4月18日にイギリスノーフォルクロウアムでKatherine Randesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1518年6月10日にイギリスノーフォルクラックヒースで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Yelverton II(이)가 1458년 영국 노르폴크 루그함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Bench(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Paston(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1486년 4월 18일 영국 노르폴크 루그함에서 Katherine Randes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1518년 6월 10일 영국 노르폴크 라크히스에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Yelverton II nasceu em 1458, em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Bench, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Anne Paston, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Randes em 18 de abril de 1486, em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de junho de 1518, em Rackheath, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Yelverton II родился в 1458 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Bench было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Paston, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Randes 18 апреля 1486 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 10 июня 1518 г. в местности раккхит, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Yelverton II nació en 1458, en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Bench, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Anne Paston, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Katherine Randes el 18 de abril de 1486, en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 10 de junio de 1518, en Rackheath, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años.
